mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('password_reset_token_seq')
INSERT INTO password_reset_token (id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, used_at, created_at FROM password_reset_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND used_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE password_reset_token SET used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
